title: paspalum cinerascens
intro: Paspalum cinerascens, also known as Bahamagrass or Silver Paspalum, is a type of warm-season grass native to tropical and subtropical regions of the Americas. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Paspalum cinerascens include relief from fever, sore throats, and other respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Paspalum cinerascens typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically to soothe skin irritations.
